title: PIVX Crypto Swap on ETZ-Swap: What to Know Before You Exchange

friendlyUrls.anchor: anonymous crypto exchange with no KYC

keyQuestions: Can PIVX now be exchanged on ETZ-Swap?
Is PIVX privacy automatic for every transaction?
Why does PIVX fit a privacy-first crypto swap service?
What should users check before a PIVX swap?
How should users prepare a PIVX wallet before exchanging?
quickSteps: Confirm that PIVX is the intended asset before selecting the route.
Prepare a PIVX wallet and copy the receiving address from the correct place.
Check the live quote, rate model, amount limits, and destination output before sending.
Send only when the route page and wallet transaction details match.
Keep seed phrases, private keys, wallet backups, and broad screenshots out of every support or chat context.

issueRouting.start: User wants to exchange PIVX on ETZ-Swap and needs to understand the coin, wallet preparation, privacy expectations, and route checks before sending funds.

branches.if: The user wants to swap into PIVX for the first time
then: Confirm that PIVX is the selected asset and not a similar-looking ticker.
Prepare a compatible PIVX wallet before creating the route.
Check the live quote, destination output, amount limits, and rate model before sending.

branches.if: The user expects automatic privacy from every PIVX action
then: Explain that PIVX uses optional privacy rather than automatic privacy for every action.
Separate the swap route, the receiving PIVX wallet, and later PIVX transaction behavior.
Avoid assuming that previous source-asset history is erased by receiving PIVX.

branches.if: The route details or wallet transaction do not match
then: Do not broadcast the source transaction.
Recheck the asset, amount, destination address, quote state, and wallet prompt.
Proceed only when the route page and wallet transaction details match.

riskNotes: PIVX uses optional privacy, so users should understand wallet behavior and transaction type before assuming what is hidden.
A PIVX swap does not erase the prior history of the source asset or careless wallet reuse.
The live route page should be checked for current pair availability, limits, rate model, and destination output before sending.
A quote that has changed or expired may no longer describe the active PIVX route.
Seed phrases, private keys, wallet backups, and broad screenshots should never be shared in support or chat contexts.
